title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 27 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 27 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 27 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/05/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures were in the doldrums, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 698.5, down 1.76% for the day. Traders sold goodsin line with market conditions, while steel mills adopted a wait-and-see attitude and purchased as needed. The market transaction atmosphere was average.
